name: coding-harness
description: Coding Harness — file read/write/edit, search, and shell commands, with file tools and command cwd scoped to a working directory
author: sapphire

settings.label: Working Directory
settings.help: All tools open here. Relative paths resolve against the Sapphire root; absolute paths allowed. Created on first use.

settings.label: Sandbox to Working Directory
settings.help: Confines the file tools (read/write/edit) and each run_command's STARTING directory to the working dir. run_command still uses a shell, so a command can read/write outside it (e.g. 'cat ../file') — the blacklist below is the real guardrail for commands.

settings.label: Output Limit (chars)
settings.help: Maximum characters returned by file reads and command output

settings.label: Max Timeout (seconds)
settings.help: Maximum allowed timeout for any command

settings.label: Command Blacklist
settings.default:
rm -rf /
--no-preserve-root
mkfs
dd if=/dev
:(){ :|:& };:
> /dev/sda
chmod -R 777 /
init 0
init 6
settings.help: Blocked substrings for run_command, one per line
